title: Cheese Kimchi Crunchie
description: A crowd-pleasing Korean dish featuring a blend of sour kimchi and crispy cheese slices that's perfect for a diabetic-friendly snack.
instructions: Place the kimchi in a mixing bowl.
Add soy sauce and rice vinegar to the kimchi, stirring well until evenly coated with the dressing.
Gently lay out cheese slices over the kimchi mixture, ensuring they are evenly distributed.
Allow the cheese slices to absorb the flavors of the kimchi and marinade for about 10 minutes.
